response.justification: Twenty years of strong technical foundation and multiple staff-level roles meet the seniority requirement, but the role explicitly requires demonstrated AI expertise and strategic cloud platform vision—neither is evident in the resume. No AI/ML projects, products, or advanced degrees in AI-related fields are present, representing a fundamental misalignment with the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy focus.
strengths: Meets seniority baseline with 20 years of experience and multiple Staff-level roles
Diverse technical stack across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience founding and maintaining GISCollective
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, projects, or recognized products built with AI
Lacking advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field; only Bachelor's degrees listed
No evidence of strategic platform advising or cloud strategy work required for director-level role
